CreateSat.title: Create Satellite
CreateSat.helpBody:
The Create Satellite menu allows you to create a satellite by entering orbital elements manually or by importing an STK ephemeris (.e) file.

Basic Tab: Enter apogee, perigee, and inclination to quickly create a satellite.

Advanced Tab: Enter full Keplerian elements (inclination, RAAN, eccentricity, argument of perigee, mean anomaly, mean motion).

STK .e Import: Drag and drop an STK ephemeris file onto the menu. Supported formats: EphemerisTimePosVel, EphemerisTimePos, and EphemerisTimePosVelAcc in inertial coordinate systems (J2000, ICRF, TEME, etc.). Time formats EpSec and UTCG are supported. Keywords are case-insensitive.

Not Supported: Geodetic formats (LLA, LLR, MSL, Terrain), non-inertial frames (Fixed, TrueOfDate), and covariance data are not supported.
